sections.paragraph:
- Original: Σαλαμίς

- Transliteration: Salamis

- Phonetic: sal-am-ece'

- Definition: Salmis = "salt"

1. a principal city at the east end of the island of Cyprus

- Origin: probably from G4535 (from the surge on the shore)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Probably from G4535 (from the surge on the shore); Salamis a place in Cyprus: - Salamis.
